privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a 3-page ActivInspire flipchart file saved as 'animal_classification.flipchart'. All taxonomic claims are verified: vertebrates consist of Fish, Amphibians, Reptiles, Birds, and Mammals; invertebrates include Insects, Arachnids, and Mollusks. All ten listed animals (Eagle, Salmon, Frog, Spider, Snail, Cobra, Butterfly, Dolphin, Beetle, Turtle) are correctly classified: vertebrates include Eagle (bird), Salmon (fish), Frog (amphibian), Cobra (reptile), and Dolphin (mammal); invertebrates include Spider (arachnid), Snail (mollusk), Butterfly (insect), Beetle (insect), and Turtle is actually a reptile (vertebrate, not invertebrate). The task requires 3 pages, at least 8 shapes for the tree diagram, and at least 6 animal examples.
